title: ::SAMPLE::
content:
::SAMPLE::

RITUAL NAME: D3VOT10N_G4T3

Dualcore:
- divine = +1.0
- glitch = -0.4

Fusion Signal: SH1MM3R_FR4CTURE

Binary Lock: B05 = create (pass)

Effect:
- Jessica enters in fractured voice mode
- Delay FX activated
- System enters recursive prayer mode

# Notes
You can pre-write these as `ritual_cards`, `event_switches`, or `narrative_scene.gates`.

Export each as:
- `.ritual` JSON / MD file
- Synth Patch + Text Modifier + Binary Lock
- Storable in `RITUAL_ENGINE_CABINET`
